0.text: Parenchymal infiltration in the right middle lobe

1.text: Nodular consolidations with halo findings in the right middle lobe

2.text: Nodular consolidations with halo findings in the right lower lobe

3.text: Nodular consolidations with halo findings in both upper and lower lobes of the left lung

4.text: Nodular ground-glass opacities in several foci in the right middle lobe

5.text: Nodular ground-glass opacities in several foci in the right lower lobe

6.text: Nodular ground-glass opacities in several foci in both upper and lower lobes of the left lung

7.text: Several subcentimeter nonspecific pulmonary nodules in both lungs

8.text: Shrinkage and distortion in the lung parenchyma
